_publications._publicationTitle: Using Durometers to Quantify Stiffness as an Outcome Measure for Cutaneous Neurofibroma in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The mean difference between measurements was close to zero, and 98.5% of the points fell within the limits of agreement (LOAs)
details: 98.5% of repeated measurements fell within limits of agreement on Bland-Altman analysis
